data_description.name: Display name of this HEMS instance.
data_description.grid_power_sensor: Current power at the grid connection in watts. Negative values usually mean export, positive values mean import.
data_description.grid_import_power_sensors: Separate positive sensors for grid import in watts. Multiple sensors are summed.
data_description.grid_export_power_sensors: Separate positive sensors for grid export in watts. Multiple sensors are summed.
data_description.grid_signed_import_positive_sensors: Signed grid sensors where positive values mean import and negative values mean export.
data_description.grid_signed_export_positive_sensors: Signed grid sensors where positive values mean export and negative values mean import.
data_description.grid_average_sensor: Smoothed grid power, ideally a 15-minute average in watts. This avoids frequent switching.
data_description.grid_import_price_sensor: Optional price per kWh for imported grid energy. BB HEMS uses the fallback value when no sensor is configured.
data_description.grid_export_price_sensor: Optional price per kWh for exported energy. BB HEMS uses the fallback value when no sensor is configured.
data_description.pv_power_sensors: One or more current power sensors for PV systems or balcony plants in watts. BB HEMS sums these values.
data_description.pv_source_profiles: Optional JSON list of named PV sources with name, sensor, peak, azimuth, tilt and category. Example: [{"name":"Garden balcony PV","sensor":"sensor.bkw_garden_power","peak":800,"azimuth":220,"tilt":15,"category":"balcony"}]
data_description.pv_average_sensor: Smoothed PV power, ideally a 15-minute average in watts.
data_description.pv_forecast_today_sensor: Optional PV forecast for the remaining day or daily yield. Helps detect weak PV days.
data_description.pv_forecast_next_hour_sensor: Optional PV power forecast for the next hour. Helps detect rising PV soon.
data_description.pv_forecast_next_3h_sensor: Optional PV power forecast for the next 3 hours. Helps decide whether a better PV window is coming later.
data_description.pv_array_specs: Optional PV surfaces as a list. Examples: South=180:30:4x430, Garage East=90:10:2x400 or 180:30:800. Format: Name=azimuth:tilt:modules x Wp or azimuth:tilt:Wp.
data_description.battery_soc_sensors: Battery state-of-charge sensors in percent. With multiple batteries, BB HEMS uses the lowest SoC as protection value.
data_description.battery_discharge_sensors: Current battery discharge power in watts. BB HEMS sums these values and stops flexible loads when discharge is too high.
data_description.battery_charge_sensors: Current battery charge power in watts. From the configured minimum battery SoC, BB HEMS can conservatively plan part of this as usable surplus.
data_description.battery_signed_discharge_positive_sensor: Signed battery sensors where positive values mean discharge and negative values mean charge.
data_description.battery_signed_charge_positive_sensors: Signed battery sensors where positive values mean charge and negative values mean discharge.
data_description.house_load_sensors: Positive house load sensors in watts. Multiple sensors are summed.
data_description.ac_battery_profiles: Optional JSON list of controllable AC batteries such as EcoFlow Stream. Requires soc_sensor, charge_power_number and discharge_power_number; optional charge_power_sensor, discharge_power_sensor, min_soc, max_soc, reserve_soc, max_charge_power, max_discharge_power, control_interval_seconds and direction_switch_delay_seconds.
data_description.virtual_battery_charge_sensor: Optional charge power sensor for a DIY battery without its own SoC.
data_description.virtual_battery_discharge_sensor: Optional discharge power sensor for a DIY battery without its own SoC.
data_description.weather_state_sensor: Weather state as a sensor or weather entity, for example sunny, partlycloudy or rainy.
data_description.cloud_sensor: Cloud coverage in percent. Lower values make PV surplus more likely.
data_description.sunshine_sensor: Sunshine duration or sunshine indicator. The value should increase when sunshine is currently available.
data_description.sun_entity: Home Assistant sun entity, usually sun.sun. BB HEMS uses elevation and azimuth for the PV window.
data_description.flexible_load_switches: Switchable loads that may be enabled during surplus, for example a dehumidifier.
data_description.flexible_load_power_sensors: Optional power sensors for flexible loads in the same order as the switches. While a load is running, BB HEMS uses this real consumption instead of the global estimate.
data_description.start_only_appliance_switches: Devices BB HEMS may only start, but should not turn off after that. Suitable for washing machines, dishwashers or dryers. Switch, input_boolean and button are supported.
data_description.start_only_appliance_power_sensors: Optional power sensors in the same order. BB HEMS uses them to detect whether the program is actually running.
data_description.device_profiles: Optional JSON device profiles with name, switch/button, category, power, priority, minimum runtime, cooldown, battery usage and control mode managed or start_only.
data_description.wallbox_switches: Switchable wallboxes or charging-enable entities. Currently stored as a device group for later prioritization.
data_description.heat_pump_switches: Switchable heat pumps or SG-ready enable entities. Currently stored as a device group for later prioritization.
data_description.heating_rod_switches: Switchable heating rods or boiler-enable entities. BB HEMS treats them as surplus loads.
data_description.heating_rod_power_sensors: Optional power sensors for heating rods in the same order as the switches.
data_description.heating_rod_temperature_sensors: Optional temperature sensors for heating rods in the same order as the switches.
data_description.heating_rod_target_temperatures: Optional target temperatures in the same order as the heating rods, for example 55, 28.

init.title: Change BB HEMS sources
init.description: Choose which source group you want to edit.

menu_option_descriptions.energy_sources: Edit grid, PV sources, short PV forecasts, battery, house load and prices.
menu_option_descriptions.weather_sources: Edit cloud coverage and sun position so BB HEMS can evaluate PV windows better.
menu_option_descriptions.load_flexible: Edit normal loads that BB HEMS may turn on during surplus and turn off again when surplus is gone.
menu_option_descriptions.load_start_only: Edit appliances BB HEMS may only start, such as washing machines, dishwashers or dryers.
menu_option_descriptions.load_heating_rods: Edit heating rods, power sensors, temperature sensors and target temperatures.
menu_option_descriptions.load_wallboxes: Edit wallbox switches or charging release entities.
menu_option_descriptions.load_heat_pumps: Edit heat-pump switches or SG-ready release entities.
menu_option_descriptions.load_advanced: Edit optional JSON profiles for priority, power, cooldown, minimum runtime and start-only behavior.

energy_sources.title: Grid, PV and battery
energy_sources.description: Configure the sensors BB HEMS uses for grid power, PV, battery state of charge, battery discharge and battery charging.

weather_sources.title: Sun
weather_sources.description: These sensors help BB HEMS evaluate PV surplus using clouds and sun position.

data_description.cloud_sensor: Cloud coverage in percent. Lower values make PV surplus more likely.
data_description.sun_entity: Home Assistant sun entity, usually sun.sun. BB HEMS uses elevation and azimuth for the PV window.

load_sources.title: Loads and power sensors
load_sources.description: Configure switchable loads and their real power sensors. Power sensors must be in the same order as the switches.

data_description.flexible_load_switches: Switchable loads that may be enabled during surplus, for example a dehumidifier.
data_description.flexible_load_power_sensors: Optional power sensors for flexible loads in the same order as the switches. While a load is running, BB HEMS uses this real consumption instead of the global estimate.
data_description.start_only_appliance_switches: Devices BB HEMS may only start, but should not turn off after that. Suitable for washing machines, dishwashers or dryers. Switch, input_boolean and button are supported.
data_description.start_only_appliance_power_sensors: Optional power sensors in the same order. BB HEMS uses them to detect whether the program is actually running.
data_description.device_profiles: Optional JSON device profiles with name, switch/button, category, power, priority, minimum runtime, cooldown, battery usage and control mode managed or start_only.
data_description.wallbox_switches: Switchable wallboxes or charging-enable entities. Currently stored as a device group for later prioritization.
data_description.heat_pump_switches: Switchable heat pumps or SG-ready enable entities. Currently stored as a device group for later prioritization.
data_description.heating_rod_switches: Switchable heating rods or boiler-enable entities. BB HEMS treats them as surplus loads.
data_description.heating_rod_power_sensors: Optional power sensors for heating rods in the same order as the switches.

load_flexible.title: Flexible loads
load_flexible.description: BB HEMS may turn these loads on during surplus and turn them off again later.

data_description.flexible_load_switches: Switchable loads that may be enabled during surplus, for example a dehumidifier.
data_description.flexible_load_power_sensors: Optional power sensors in the same order. While a load is running, BB HEMS uses this real consumption instead of the global estimate.

load_start_only.title: Start-only appliances
load_start_only.description: BB HEMS starts these appliances only when surplus fits. After that, BB HEMS will not turn them off automatically.

data_description.start_only_appliance_switches: Switch, input_boolean or button. Example: switch.dishwasher_start. BB HEMS starts the appliance only and will not turn it off afterwards.
data_description.start_only_appliance_power_sensors: Optional. With a power sensor, BB HEMS can detect whether the program is actually running. Without a power sensor, BB HEMS blocks conservatively after start so the appliance is not started again.

load_heating_rods.title: Heating rods
load_heating_rods.description: Heating rods are surplus loads and can optionally be limited by target temperature.

data_description.heating_rod_switches: Switchable heating rods or boiler/pool release entities.
data_description.heating_rod_power_sensors: Optional power sensors in the same order as the heating rods.
data_description.heating_rod_temperature_sensors: Optional temperature sensors in the same order as the heating rods.
data_description.heating_rod_target_temperatures: Optional target temperatures in the same order, for example 55, 28. BB HEMS turns the heating rod off when the target temperature is reached.

load_wallboxes.title: Wallboxes
load_wallboxes.description: Configure wallbox switches or charging release entities here.

data_description.wallbox_switches: Switchable wallboxes or charging release entities. Detailed charge-current control follows later.

load_heat_pumps.title: Heat pumps
load_heat_pumps.description: Configure heat-pump switches or SG-ready release entities here.

data_description.heat_pump_switches: Switchable heat pumps or SG-ready release entities. Comfort bands and thermal buffers follow later.

load_advanced.title: Advanced device profiles
load_advanced.description: Optional for devices that need per-device priority, power, battery usage, cooldown, minimum runtime or start-only behavior.

pv_battery_ac_charge_threshold_soc.name: AC battery charge from PV battery SoC
